summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pet Grooming website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, page content, and contact form submission.
passed_tests: Navigation menu works - all 5 pages (Home, About, Services, Gallery, Contact) load correctly
Home page displays hero section with 'Book Now' button and 3 feature cards (Loving Care, Expert Groomers, Natural Products)
About page shows company story and team section with 3 team members (Sarah Johnson, Mike Chen, Emma Davis)
Services page displays 6 service cards with icons and prices ($30, $55, $80, $15, $20, $45)
Gallery page shows 6 pet images in grid layout with valid Unsplash sources
Contact page has info section and contact form with 4 fields (Name, Email, Subject, Message)
Contact form submission shows correct alert message: 'Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.'
Active navigation highlighting works - pastel green background applied to active nav link
